You won't find a cleaner deal, so let's get you behind the wheel!

args.message: You know, it’s funny you mention the gasket. We actually had a mechanic buddy of mine look at it right after that inspection. He confirmed it’s a very, very minor seep – the kind that might add a few bucks to your oil changes over the next year or two, max. He said it’s not something that needs immediate attention at all, and it’s definitely not affecting performance. I still stand by my previous offer of $10,500. It’s a solid car, and that’s a fair price considering everything.
